diagnosis: SAGE abstract gap was mostly scorer-owned: current Goldie stores literal ellipsis-terminated abstract prefixes while Parseland emits the full page abstract. The scorer now credits only normalized prefix matches, preserving empty policy and real mismatch detection.
recommendation: Ship scorer fix. SAGE abstract improves but remains below 98%; residual rows are parser-empty SAGE Knowledge pages, retrieval-blocked rows, one backfill candidate, and non-truncated full-text mismatches for follow-up diagnosis.
